title: Assembly Elections LIVE updates: ECI approves transfer of returning officers for West Bengal polls
summary: A total of 445 candidates have filed nominations for the 30 assembly constituencies in the Union Territory of Puducherry

title: HRF urges Telangana CM for release of prisoners as per schedule
Parliament Budget Session LIVE: Lok Sabha to discuss Bill to amend trans rights
summary: The Union Government’s Bill to remove transgender people’s right to a self-perceived gender identity and redefine a “transgender person” has been listed for consideration and passing in Lok Sabha today

title: Rebuff to ‘self-styled Vishwaguru’, says Congress, on reports of Pakistan mediating in West Asia
summary: Congress said that in spite of India’s undoubted military successes in Operation Sindoor, Pakistan’s diplomatic engagement and narrative management has been “markedly superior to that of the Modi government”

title: Water pipeline leak triggers waterlogging, traffic congestion in Miyapur
25 leopards relocated from Maharashtra to Gujarat's Vantara facility: Minister
summary: The population of leopards has risen four times in 10 years. The State, which had 101 tigers seven-eight years back, now has 444, Maharashtra’s Forest Minister Ganesh Naik said

title: Bomb threat email triggers security alert at Delhi Assembly ahead of Budget
summary: The bomb threat was sent to the Assembly Speaker Vijender Gupta’s email address around 7.30 a.m.

title: Centre mulls delimitation based on 2011 Census to fast-track Women’s Reservation Act
summary: “Under the amendments that the government wants to bring in, the basis for the selection of seats will be the Census data of 2011. The number of seats in Parliament will increase to 816, out of which 273 will be reserved for women,” a source said
